candidate_has_evidence.q: Does each candidate have fit evidence + why-now from lead-research?

personalization_is_specific.q: Does the first line cite a real public signal (not generic praise)?

single_clear_ask.q: Is there exactly one low-friction CTA (reply, 15-min call, try link)?

claims_verified.q: Are product claims traceable to product-intelligence profile?

followups_add_value.q: Do follow-ups add new proof/asset (not 'just bumping')?
